item.title: A3 Officially Releases GigE Vision 3.0, Opening New Possibilities in Machine Vision
item.description: The release of GigE Vision 3.0 introduces new standards and possibilities for machine vision applications.

item.title: Sereact Raises $110M to Scale Physical AI and Bring ‘Thinking’ Robots to Industry
item.description: Sereact secured $110 million in Series B funding to expand its predictive AI robotic platforms for industrial automation into the US market.

item.title: Edge Cloud and AI Integration Transform Audi’s Production Quality and Inspection Systems
item.description: Audi is deploying its Edge Cloud 4 Production platform to introduce advanced AI process monitoring and automated quality assurance across large-scale automotive manufacturing.

item.title: BMW Inline Terahertz Paint Thickness Measurement
item.description: BMW Plant Leipzig is introducing a new inline terahertz paint thickness measurement system for exterior parts.

item.title: Scalable, PC-Free AI Inspection with Cognex In-Sight 3900
item.description: Cognex's new In-Sight 3900 enables highly scalable, PC-free AI inspection on the factory floor.

item.title: Automated Optical Inspection Systems Market Is Booming Worldwide | Cognex Corporation • Omron Corporation - openPR.com
item.description: The automated optical inspection systems market shows booming worldwide growth driven by major players like Cognex and Omron.

item.title: 3D Infotech Announces 40 Percent Metrology Automation Revenue Growth
item.description: 3D Infotech announces a 40% year-over-year revenue increase driven by strong demand from automotive and aerospace manufacturers.
